ApprovalRequestForm.text_271: Gamblock AI - Quick Approval via WhatsApp

approvalFlow.title: Protection change request
approvalFlow.body: A protected user is asking their accountability partner for a decision.
approvalFlow.footer: This decision is limited to this request and recorded securely.
approvalFlow.approvedBody: The user can apply the approved change from the associated device.
approvalFlow.deniedBody: The request is closed and protection remains active.

errors.invalid_token: The approval link is invalid or has expired.
errors.resolve_failed: The decision could not be saved. Please try again.
errors.unavailable: The approval link cannot be used.

[id]Page.text_286: in depth. You’ll learn the basic concepts, the underlying psychological mechanisms, and practical techniques you can apply immediately in daily life to maintain self-regulation stability.
[id]Page.text_287: 1. Basic Concepts & The Importance of Self-Regulation
[id]Page.text_289: , failure to resist gambling urges is often caused by reduced cognitive-control capacity at critical moments (e.g. when tired, anxious, or under financial pressure). Understanding these vulnerable situations is a crucial first step.
[id]Page.text_292: Note the emotions you feel before the urge to access a gambling site appears (stress, boredom, or loneliness?).
[id]Page.text_294: When the urge appears, take a deep 10-second breath. Focus your mind on the long-term consequences.
[id]Page.text_296: Don’t hesitate to send a short message to your registered partner to ask for moral support.
[id]Page.text_297: Building solid self-control takes time and consistent practice. Every successful resistance to an impulsive urge, however small, is a step toward full recovery.
[id]Page.text_299: Finish reading the material above to record your progress.

[token]Page.text_305: Anda sekarang resmi terdaftar sebagai **Pendamping Akuntabilitas**. Anda akan menerima notifikasi jika pengguna terproteksi meminta izin penonaktifan atau pause proteksi.
[token]Page.text_309: Anda diundang untuk menjadi pendamping akuntabilitas pemulihan judi online. Tugas Anda adalah membantu memantau dan memberikan persetujuan saat diperlukan.

accountabilityWorkspace.title: Recovery is stronger together
accountabilityWorkspace.description: Connect with a trusted partner who can approve protection changes and support your recovery commitment.
accountabilityWorkspace.privacyBody: Partners cannot see your URLs, domains, browsing history, mood, intention, or private journal.
accountabilityWorkspace.errorBody: Check your connection and try again.
accountabilityWorkspace.partnerDescription: Invite a trusted person to become your accountability partner for protection change approvals.
accountabilityWorkspace.partnerEmailHelp: Enter the email of your trusted partner (e.g. family, close friend, or counselor).
accountabilityWorkspace.activePartnerHelp: Your partner is connected and will receive approval requests when you need to change protection settings.
accountabilityWorkspace.invitedPartnerHelp: The invitation is ready. Share the consent link securely so your partner can accept it.
accountabilityWorkspace.inviteSuccess: The invitation for {email} is ready. Share its consent link securely.
accountabilityWorkspace.inviteError: The partner invitation could not be created.
accountabilityWorkspace.revokeDialogBody: You will need to invite a new partner to restore approval-based protection changes.
accountabilityWorkspace.revokeError: The accountability relationship could not be disconnected.
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalTitle: Protection changes start on the device
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalDescription: Pause, disable, and removal requests must be created from the Android or Windows app so they are bound to the protected device.
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalActiveBody: Your partner is connected. Open Gamblock AI on the device you want to change to create a secure request.
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalInactiveBody: Connect a partner, then open Gamblock AI on the protected device.
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalDialogBody: Under the social accountability protocol, changing protection settings requires your partner's approval. Provide your reason below.
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalReasonPlaceholder: Why do you want to change protection settings? Write an honest reason for your partner...
accountabilityWorkspace.approvalReasonAudience: This reason will be shared with your partner for their review.
accountabilityWorkspace.pendingBody: A request is waiting for your partner's decision. You will be notified when they respond.
accountabilityWorkspace.cancelDialogBody: You can submit a new request later if needed.
accountabilityWorkspace.requestCancelError: The request could not be cancelled.
accountabilityWorkspace.partnerInboxBody: Review the reason and deadline before deciding. You do not receive browsing data or private recovery notes.
accountabilityWorkspace.approveDialogBody: The requested protection change may be applied after this decision is saved.
accountabilityWorkspace.denyDialogBody: The request will close as denied. The user can submit another request if needed.
accountabilityWorkspace.requestDecisionError: The decision could not be saved.
accountabilityWorkspace.historyDescription: Previous approval requests and their outcomes.
accountabilityWorkspace.historyEmptyBody: Approval requests you submit will appear here.

partnerWorkspace.title: Support that protects student privacy
partnerWorkspace.description: This workspace only provides safe support paths. Synthetic metrics and example organizations are not shown as if they were real data.
partnerWorkspace.privacyBody: Partners cannot see a student's URLs, domains, browsing history, mood, intention, or private journal.
partnerWorkspace.relationshipBody: View invitation and relationship status created with both parties' consent.
partnerWorkspace.approvalBody: Review active requests from the accountability page. Decisions can only be made by the partner on an active relationship.
partnerWorkspace.supportBody: Use the help center to understand the partner role and provide support without excessive monitoring.
partnerWorkspace.liveStatus: Requests are persisted and limited to active relationships
